content:
Now that you’ve studied the core mechanics of your inspirations, the next section will focus on developing your own idea from scratch.

🔥 Coming Up Next: Crafting Your Own Story Idea (Loglines & Expanding Concepts)
• Writing a logline that captures the soul of your story.
• Developing your idea in multiple structures to see what fits best.
• Testing your premise by rewriting it in five different ways.

Would you like these sections as a workbook with writing space? Let me know, and I can format this into a printable PDF.
context: From document: The Graphic Novel Writing Guide for Derek: Inspiration, Structure… — chunk 22 (chunk 22/22)
